steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate y
steps.content:
The $y$ coefficients are opposites ($+1$ and $-1$), so adding the equations eliminates $y$:

$$(x + y) + (x - y) = 19 + 9$$
$$2x = 28$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:

$$x = 14$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
